title: resilient-write L3 error envelope
description: Structured error payload returned by every failing tool in the resilient-write MCP server. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md#layer-3 and docs/ERRORS.md for the handling guide.

ok.description: Always false for an error envelope. Success responses carry ok=true and tool-specific fields instead.

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Bumped on breaking changes to the shape.

error.description: Class of failure. Agents should branch on this for coarse-grained handling.

reason_hint.description: Best-effort hint about *why* the sink rejected the payload. Agents use this to decide between redact / split / retry / abort strategies.

detected_patterns.description: Pattern family names (e.g. 'api_key', 'github_pat') when the failure is a content-filter block. Empty for non-filter failures. Matches the L0 family taxonomy in docs/POLICY.md.

suggested_action.description: Recommended recovery action. The agent MAY choose differently if context warrants, but SHOULD default to this.

retry_budget.description: How many retries remain before the server refuses additional attempts. Counts down per-call.

context.description: Free-form per-error context. Fields vary by error+reason; conventional keys include path, sha256, expected_sha256, actual_sha256, score, verdict, session, reason.
